brand-story-img.query: Velmora was born from a simple desire: to create demi-fine jewelry that feels incredibly luxurious, without the traditional retail markups. We source premium materials, focusing on 18K gold vermeil and ethically sourced accents, to craft pieces you'll want to live in. Quiet Luxury, Everyday.
